parts.text:
```plantuml
@startuml
class Player
class Piece
class King
class Queen
class Bishop
class Knight
class Rook
class Pawn

Player o--> "16" Piece
Player *-- King
Player *-- Queen
Player *-- "2" Bishop
Player *-- "2" Knight
Player *-- "2" Rook
Player *-- "8" Pawn

Piece <|-- King
Piece <|-- Queen
Piece <|-- Bishop
Piece <|-- Knight
Piece <|-- Rook
Piece <|-- Pawn
@enduml
```
